name: DANA Indonesian Digital Wallet and Payment API
what_it_does: DANA Indonesian digital wallet and payment REST API for Indonesian merchants, e-commerce platforms, and fintech developers to accept DANA wallet payments, initiate wallet-to-wallet transfers, and integrate Indonesia's rapidly growing digital payment ecosystem — enabling DANA wallet checkout, QR code payment, debit from wallet, and merchant settlement through DANA's digital payment platform backed by Ant Group and Emtek Group. Enables AI agents to manage DANA wallet payment for Indonesian digital checkout automation, handle QR payment for QRIS code integration automation, access payment confirmation for order fulfillment automation, retrieve transaction status for payment verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle wallet transfer for P2P payment automation, access merchant settlement for disbursement automation, retrieve webhook for payment event notification automation, manage virtual account for bank transfer payment automation, and integrate DANA with Indonesian e-commerce, marketplace, and super app platforms for end-to-end digital wallet payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting DANA wallet payments from Indonesian consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Integrating DANA QRIS QR code payments for Indonesian retail and online payment automation agents
Processing merchant settlements from DANA digital wallet transactions for financial reconciliation automation agents
Offering DANA as payment option in Indonesian super apps and marketplace platforms automation agents
not_for: Non-Indonesian markets (DANA is Indonesia-specific digital wallet)
International cross-border payments (DANA is domestic Indonesian payment wallet)
B2B enterprise invoice payments (DANA is consumer/retail digital wallet)
best_when: An Indonesian merchant, e-commerce platform, or fintech developer wanting AI agents to accept DANA wallet payments, integrate QRIS QR code payments, and process merchant settlements through DANA's digital payment platform.
avoid_when: OJK E-MONEY REGULATION: DANA operates as OJK-licensed e-money issuer; automated non-OJK-compliant payment implementation creates regulatory violation; automated must comply with Bank Indonesia PBI 20/2018 for e-money. CONSUMER AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED: DANA payments require consumer to authenticate in DANA app; automated server-side payment deduction without user authentication creates payment failure; automated must redirect consumer to DANA authentication for payment confirmation. QRIS IS INTEROPERABLE STANDARD: DANA supports QRIS (national QR standard) for payments; automated DANA-proprietary QR assumption creates incompatible QR code; automated should use QRIS for maximum interoperability with all Indonesian e-wallets. MERCHANT ONBOARDING REQUIRED: DANA payment integration requires merchant onboarding and agreement; automated open API assumption creates no access; automated must complete DANA merchant registration process.

auth.notes: DANA uses API key with HMAC-SHA256 signature for merchant authentication. REST API with JSON. Jakarta, Indonesia HQ. Founded 2018. Backed by Ant Group (Alibaba) and Emtek Group. Products: Digital wallet, QR payment (QRIS), virtual account, merchant checkout, P2P transfer, investment. SDKs: None public. OJK licensed e-money issuer. 100M+ users. QRIS enabled. Competes with GoPay and ShopeePay for Indonesian digital wallet.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (MDR) per transaction type; volume-based pricing
pricing.notes: Jakarta ID. OJK e-money. Ant Group + Emtek backed. 100M+ users. MDR per transaction.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and transfer APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: HMAC SIGNATURE REQUIRED: DANA API requires HMAC-SHA256 request signing with timestamp; automated unsigned API request assumption creates 401 authentication failure; automated must implement DANA HMAC signing specification for every API request

CONSUMER AUTHENTICATION VIA APP REDIRECT: DANA payments require consumer to confirm in DANA app; automated server-side payment deduction without consumer interaction creates payment initiation failure; automated must implement deeplink or redirect to DANA app for consumer payment authorization

QRIS IS PREFERRED OVER PROPRIETARY QR: DANA supports Bank Indonesia QRIS standard for maximum e-wallet interoperability; automated DANA-proprietary QR assumption limits payment to DANA users only; automated should implement QRIS for payment acceptance from any Indonesian e-wallet

MERCHANT ONBOARDING HAS KYB REQUIREMENTS: DANA merchant registration requires business entity verification (SIUP, NPWP); automated instant merchant access assumption creates pending_kyb_review state; automated must complete DANA merchant KYB before production deployment

DOCUMENTATION PRIMARILY IN BAHASA INDONESIA: DANA partner documentation is primarily in Bahasa Indonesia; automated English-only assumption creates documentation barrier; automated international developers must use translation tools for DANA integration documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indonesian digital wallet. OJK, Bank Indonesia QRIS. API key + HMAC. Indonesia. Digital wallet and payment data. Ant Group.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indonesian e-wallet. OJK, Bank Indonesia. API key + HMAC. Indonesia. Digital wallet and payment data.
